---
name: Bug report
description: Report a problem with md-mermaid-pdf
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Environment

- **Node version:** (e.g. `node -v`)
- **npm version:** (e.g. `npm -v`)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)

## Minimal markdown input

```markdown
# Paste minimal markdown that reproduces the issue
```

## Expected vs actual

- **Expected:** (what should happen)
- **Actual:** (what happens instead)

## Additional context

- Are you running offline or in an air-gapped environment? (Mermaid loads from CDN by default.)
- Any error messages or stack traces?
